Business Name: GoMobile Tires Newport Beach
Category: Tire shop

Real Customer Reviews (Total: 10):
[1] I had a nail in my tire & decided to give them a call. Quick & Easy fix! They set up an appointment at my convenience & they come directly to your home. Their technician Mike was friendly & got the job done quickly. Overall great service especially during Covid.
[2] Very convenient with the Mobile tire installation. Friendly , speedy installer, less than an hour. I would highly recommend these guys.
[3] Go Mobile tire Is an outfit that has adapted to Covid 19 and comes to your home. They have everything that you would find in a shop but in a truck. I can have coffee in my pj’s. They’re a new breed of consumer oriented businesses that is professional, masks up and makes life truly easier during this time of COVID. What’s more, It has saved me about two hours out of my day!
[4] I could not be more pleased with with GoMobile. We use them as our tire vendor for our customers. Our standards are not low to say the least, go mobile hits home runs every single time they are here. They are very very good at what they do. Timely, professional, and educated. 5 out 5.
[5] I absolutely loved the convenience of their great tire service right at my home...It started with TireRack.com and within a few days, the tires arrived at GoMobile in Newport Beach and I had an installation appointment...Mike was very professional, courteous, and helpful, installing 4 new tires on my BMW X4 right in my driveway...install fees are very reasonable...I highly recommend GoMobile Tires, Newport Beach...skip the retail tire shops and the long waits in greasy waiting rooms...They come to you!
[6] Great support from Mike.He changed all 4 tires in our driveway in no time.I would highly recommend GoMobile Tires.
[7] This was the easiest tire transaction ever. Joe kept me very well informed, and was very helpful. Mike came out, early, and did a great job. I will without a doubt use them in the future and recommend them to everyone.
[8] I work for a small family owned business, so I understand the importance of providing a review. I will say GoMobile Tires both in Mid City, and Newport Beach, went above and beyond expectations!!! Both Joe’s from each location were very friendly, and squeezed me in for same day. They worked together to get my car taken care of, and the technician Mike, was quick, friendly, and efficient. I thank you 3 gentlemen for helping me get my tire fixed! 5 stars in regards to customer service, and another 5 stars for service! Good job guys!
[9] I am always a bit suspicious and pessimistic in using a new service provider, especially in buying products and services from a company I am not well familiar with. I also tend to question ratings, and rarely rate services unless I had a bad experience.That being said, GoMobile Tires is one of the best buying experiences I’ve had. Super professional, the tire installer was super nice, changed the tires with my vehicle in the garage, their van was super cool and the whole process was like 30-40 minutes to replace two tires.Biggest point, NO hidden fees or crazy upselling. Sent me the invoice to my phone and easy payment.Sorry Pep Boys, and ridiculous overpriced dealerships, GoMobile Tires is too good and easy to ever go back to sitting and waiting in a store.This is a real rating from a real person that used the service.
[10] GoMobile was fantastic to work with through and through. Joe and Mike were incredibly accommodating and were able to squeeze me in at late notice. Definitely would love to work with them again.

User Question: What are the key benefits of using GoMobile Tires Newport Beach's mobile tire service based on customer experiences?

Customers highlight several key benefits of using GoMobile Tires Newport Beach's mobile tire service. The service is praised for its convenience, as technicians come directly to customers' homes or driveways, saving time and avoiding trips to retail shops [1][3][5]. Installations are typically quick, often taking less than an hour or around 30-40 minutes [2][9]. Technicians like Mike and Joe are described as friendly, professional, courteous, and efficient [1][5][6][7][8][10]. The process is noted for being easy and transparent, with no hidden fees or upselling, and includes convenient payment via phone invoice [9]. During the COVID-19 pandemic, the service adapted with safety measures like masking and made life easier by reducing exposure [1][3]. Overall, customers highly recommend the service for its reliability and quality [2][4][5][6][7][9].

messages.content: You are a professional local business analyst. Please objectively and accurately answer user questions about a specific business based on the provided context. Be honest if you don't know.

Business Name: RCee's Barbershop
Category: Barber shop

Real Customer Reviews (Total: 10):
[1] I gotta say that this is one of the best barbershops I ever been to! S/O to rcess always keeping me fresh with them haircuts!
[2] Best barber's I've been too and will never go no where else. Ask for Robert.
[3] My kids get there haircuts here love it ! Tried Julio and Calvin not disappointed .
[4] I wish I can give them no stars but I will never go to this place ever again they had my husband waiting for over an hour!!! The owner greets you as always when he is there......but one thing I noticed is that they take over an hour in just 1 person!!! I mean how long does it take for a man to get a haircut??? I see other people walking in and go straight to the barber plus they charge 5$ to make appointments?? What a way to take your money🤔 my husband will never go back!! You guys just lost a customer!!
[5] My son likes me and for me that is enough
[6] Barber rank decreases as you move further in to the store. Barbers are extremely cautious with time as they are booked with appointments that allow them gain more revenue per cut. $20 to book an appointment for a standard taper, combover, fade, no shave, no touch on the beard. Decent price but never come here without an appointment because all of Paramount high school will be seated waiting for the next cut. Age demographic here is averaged at 18 years old. Expect a hip look with skeletal beings printed on the walls followed by a big sponsorship aimed at Suavecito. Manny with the tatted face gets down with the fades and he's fast too and he's nice. Danny with the black glove(smaller Danny) is good too. Fresh (bigger Danny, gauges, piercings) does a good job too. Look for the constant glares at the clock or at their watches. Your cut will end exactly at the half hour or on the hour. There's a scripted, "Any plans today?," which makes you feel welcomed rather than just another head on the seat. Owner does a good job at greeting customer's that walks in.
[7] This is the worst place ever for cutting your hair. Waiting time it's for ever. If you can find other place do it. Not Recommending big no no....
[8] Great Place to get a haircut very Good Costumer Friendly Service the Best Barbershop L.A County.
[9] Had an appointment at 5pm with TONY, it's currently 4:57pm and I walked in to find out that tony decided to leave early without any acknowledgement to his current clientele. There was 2 of us just looking at each other like "are you serious, is this really a business or a corner shop with no standards" how can a business try to gain and retain customers if they can't fulfill the needs of paying customers most importantly my VALUABLE TIME!!! I will never return to this piece of turd location that does not value their customers time and stay for their appointments!
[10] Been to many shops and im now loyal to them best barbers in town hands down go with manny he will have you looking right!!!

User Question: What are the main pros and cons of getting a haircut at RCee's Barbershop based on customer experiences?

Based on customer reviews, the main pros of RCee's Barbershop include high-quality haircuts and skilled barbers, with specific recommendations for barbers like Robert, Julio, Calvin, Manny, Danny, and Fresh [1][2][3][6][10]. Customers praise the barbers for their expertise, such as Manny being fast and good with fades, and the owner for greeting customers [6][10]. The shop is described as having a hip look with skeletal prints and Suavecito sponsorship, and it offers decent pricing, such as $20 for standard cuts [6]. It is also noted as customer-friendly and one of the best in L.A. County [8]. The main cons involve long waiting times, especially without an appointment, as some customers reported waiting over an hour or experiencing delays [4][7]. There are complaints about appointment issues, including a $5 charge for appointments and instances where barbers like Tony left early without notifying clients [4][9]. Some customers expressed dissatisfaction with the service and would not recommend the shop [4][7][9].

messages.content: You are a professional local business analyst. Please objectively and accurately answer user questions about a specific business based on the provided context. Be honest if you don't know.

Business Name: Stor-Mor Self Storage
Category: Self-storage facility, Automobile storage facility, Boat storage facility, Cold storage facility, Moving and storage service, Records storage facility, RV storage facility, Storage facility, Wine storage facility

Real Customer Reviews (Total: 10):
[1] Extremely upset with this company. I opened my unit on October 1st 2018 and paid full price. I paid for November full price. When I went back to pay for December I was told I had a balance due for the previous month. I provided my bank statements showing I had paid in full. They sent an email to the corporate office saying I had provided proof of payment. A few days after I recieved a notice that I still have not paid and recieved a late fee. Yet again I went down and provided my proof of my statements paying for the two months I had been there as well as the upcoming month of December. I had paid 3 times for 3 months. They sent another email saying I had proof and I was informed by the office employee  that I should have recieved a move in discount which I never recieved. I closed my unit and moved out. I now received another notice stating that I still owe a balance for a months rent as well as 2 late fees. Currently dealing with this problem and seeking to speak directly with the head office. VERY UNSATISFIED WITH THIS COMPANY.
[2] Laura Jo is a real deal storage expert! Thank you for your ever encouraging and kind words during a stressful move.
[3] I never normally do reviews, but I felt compelled and had to come on here due to the great customer service that Jessica (from the Cypress location) demonstrated towards me. I had some issues and had to make changes towards my storage and she did everything she can to help me out and really went out her way to provide quality customer service. I definitely recommend this location and cannot thank Jessica enough for all her efforts.
[4] this storage facility is awesome!  Patrick was very helpful, and found the perfect unit for me.  took no time, and I was back on the road again.  I would recommend this place for anyone.
[5] We've only been using Stor-Mor for a few months now... We held a unit online (special rate) and called to verify. Sarah answered and was very friendly and helpful. When we went to the Cypress location, she took the time to help us pick out the right unit for our comfort level (looked at about 5 units). Did I mention our 2 kids under 5 were with us. hahaha. The paperwork itself took no time at all. So far this place is great! Set up the auto payment or keep a credit card on file, so much easier!!! We get email reminders and just call in to charge cc on file. I've talked to Jessica as well and shes very sweet and accommodating as well. Love that its gated and you need a code to get in and out.
[6] I have to say that I never really expected the level of service that I received from a storage facility.  I am very, very happy with the service I received from Stor-Mor :) While going through the application process to get set up with a storage unit, the process was easy, and very professional and courteous staff.  Jessica Allen, the property manager their, has a great professional attitude, with a very upbeat personality and an awesome sense of humor :) I was able to get the size unit that I wanted, and gave me a good price with a great deal on my move in :) I really like the facility :) I feel very safe having my belongings there, and the facility is very secure :) In addition, Danica Klausner, the relief manager, is also a great person with a great personality and sense of humor.  I am really happy with their policies and procedures as well.  If you need to rent a storage unit, I really don't think you need to look any further than Stor-Mor :) You'll be very glad you did :)
[7] Laura was spectacular. Friendly and extremely helpful. The process was quick , she talked us through it all. Highly recommend this facility if not only for the customer service of Laura.
[8] This property has great access hours and drive up units! Laura Jo is awesome and quoted a great move-in special!
[9] Laura is the new manager at this location and she is outstanding. She is knowledgeable at what she does and the rental process easy. After shopping around I chose this location because Laura made the decision easy.
[10] Jessica was absolutely one of the nicest people I've ever dealt with at a storage facility. Super professional and laid back at the same time. She deserves a Vacation or something because she was really running around trying to see new people and rent out new units while she saw to the needs of her regular customers too. Highly Recommend.

User Question: What are the customer service experiences like at Stor-Mor Self Storage, and are there any common issues reported?

Customers have reported positive experiences with specific staff members at Stor-Mor Self Storage, highlighting their helpfulness and professionalism. For example, Jessica from the Cypress location is praised for providing great customer service and going out of her way to assist with storage issues [3]. Laura Jo is described as a real deal storage expert with encouraging and kind words [2], and Laura is noted for being spectacular, friendly, and extremely helpful, making the rental process quick and easy [7][9]. Other staff members like Patrick and Sarah are also mentioned as very helpful in finding the right unit and being friendly during the setup process [4][5]. Additionally, customers appreciate the secure, gated facility with access codes and email reminders for payments [5]. However, one customer reported a significant issue with billing and communication, involving problems with payment proof, late fees, and not receiving a move-in discount, leading to dissatisfaction and closure of their unit [1]. No other common issues are mentioned in the reviews.

[1] I TOOK MY MAZDA MIATA FOR SOME REAR END DAMAGE TO BE REPAIREDAND WHEN I WENT TO GET MY CAR IT WAS AMAZING .THE WORK DONE ON MY CAR WAS PERFECT. I WORKED WITH GALEN HUNTSMAN AND HE WAS ALWAYS AVAILABLE ,FULL OF INFORMATION AND MADE EXTRA EFFORT AT ALL TIMES . HE IS A DREAM TO WORK WITHMANY THANKSCYNDI
[2] Great Team at the Canal OfficeThey helped us with excellent and professional service with getting our truck and car repaired at a fair price for the superior quality of work.  They are spot on with communications, costs, completion date and they got a "great sensor of timing and humor". Don't forget, there's cold water in the refridg and snacks if you look hard enough.Denis Poggio
[3] C&G Auto Body is great!  In the beginning I was leary because my insurance suggested them and I wanted to be sure it wasn't some random company.  But when I met with the inspector who looked at my car, he was so thorough, addressed every single one of my concerns, and my car came back looking brand new as if nothing had ever happened!!!No alignment problems, just spankin new!  So I am happy to give them a great review, for both excellent customer service and body work.  And I really appreciated the graciousness of a loaner car as well, which made everything so effortless.Thanks you guys!!!K. Fairbanks  Gold Subaru Forester 2003
[4] I used to be regular customer and repair all four my cars till last Monday incident. My car (Porsche) got in a car accident and it was not my fault what means I needed to wait till I get all the paperwork and claim # from police. It was a late Sunday night at the time my car was towed and I as a regular customer asked to tow it to G&C repair shop address. I came to the office early morning 7:30AM asking for help to take my car, but I got reply back, that they accept by appointment only and will not accept my car to be even parked at their place. As I said before, car was towed to and is not suitable for driving (and what is actually dangerous to do so and G&C was fine with that putting me in that danger since I was asked to move the car). Because it was not my fault I was still waiting for claim # and that persons insurance to proceed at the early Monday morning I arrived and that it will take up to ONE business day. That was main point why they did not even want to talk to me about further process. (Even though I just got my other car back from repair shop on Friday... Yeah things happen, two cars almost at the same time). So they just kicked me out with the car in wrecking condition and let me figure out on my own what should I do. So since I was kicked out without any help, I found another great repair shop on the same street where I will be bringing my all 4 cars when I need it. They supported me emotionally as after G&C I was in complete shock and did not know what to do with the car which is completely crashed. I cannt manage things with the repair shop who are not able to help their regular customers during emergency.
[5] I have used G&C Auto Body several times for repairs. One time i worked with Sierra and another time i worked with Anthony. They both provided excellent, thorough, and fast service. The front office staff was also extremely helpful arranging my appointments and rental reservations. If I need my car repaired again - i will definitely go to G&C!
[6] Horrible place to have rapeir your vehicle. They do not return your call. Lack of attention to customer. I won't recommend anybody to waste the time and money
[7] I am extremely pleased by the services, timeliness, courtesy and thoughtfulness I received resultant from an unoccupied hit-and-run accident to my vehicle.  The quality of work performed was exemplary. Service Writer Erik. exhibited a great amount of care and concern, always keeping me informed on what and when as well as completion time. Erik ensured me through timely communications via phone, text and email.  I do not hesitate in recommending the company and personnel of G & C Auto Body San Rafael.  Thank you!
[8] I’ve been to G & C twice and they are impeccable in their work, service and friendliness with customers.  They truly go above and beyond.  Car problems are the worst with all of the stress involved but G & C takes care of things and brings that stress way down. Always on time, providing information and choices throughout the process and handling everything with insurance.  They even handled car rental issues when that’s not their job just to ease stress! The best part is my car looks as good or better before the damage.  I love that it’s family owned and really genuine care. I’ve been to G & C twice and they are impeccable in their work, service and friendliness with customers.  They truly go above and beyond.  Car problems are the worst with all of the stress involved but G & C takes care of things and brings that stress way down. Always on time, providing information and choices throughout the process and handling everything with insurance.  They even handled car rental issues when that’s not their job just to ease stress! The best part is my car looks as good or better before the damage.  I love that it’s family owned and really genuine care.
[9] G and C is the best body shop I went to. They were super friendly and very attentive. Great body work and paint job. They fixed my car and delivered it on the time they promised.
[10] I rarely leave bad reviews but my experience with G&C has been horrible. First, I scheduled an appointment for an estimate but when I came in for it they had no record of my appointment. The same woman who was working that day was the one I spoke to on the phone yet she had no recollection of our conversation. Luckily a technician was there and was able to assess my car. He was very kind and promised me an estimate by email ASAP.Unfortunately, this estimate didn't come and still hasn't! I called G&C the day after my appointment asking when I might get my quote from the technician, when she went to look up my information she couldn't find me in the system....Once again they had forgotten about me. I am finally transferred to the technicians phone line, I leave a message kindly asking for a call back and estimated date for the quote. I never hear back. It's been almost a week and I have heard absolutely nothing.I usually wouldn't make such a fuss about this but to say the least G&C doesn't seem to care about customer service or acquiring new business. It's a huge disappointment and I don't think I'll be recommending their services any time soon.

User Question: What are the key aspects of customer service and work quality at G & C Auto Body based on customer experiences?

Customers report that G & C Auto Body provides excellent and professional service, with staff who are always available, full of information, and make extra effort, such as Galen Huntsman [1]. The team is spot on with communications, costs, and completion dates, and they have a great sense of timing and humor [2]. Service writers like Erik exhibit care and concern, keeping customers informed via phone, text, and email [7]. The staff is described as super friendly, very attentive, and helpful in arranging appointments and rental reservations [5][9]. They go above and beyond by handling insurance and car rental issues to reduce stress [8]. However, some customers have had negative experiences, including issues with appointment scheduling, lack of communication, and not returning calls [6][10]. One customer reported being turned away without help during an emergency, despite being a regular customer [4]. In terms of work quality, customers praise the perfect and exemplary repairs, with cars looking brand new or better after damage, and no alignment problems noted [1][3][7][8][9]. The body work and paint jobs are described as great, and the service is fast and thorough [5][9]. Prices are considered fair for the superior quality of work [2]. Overall, many customers highly recommend G & C Auto Body for both customer service and body work [1][3][7][8], though some do not recommend it due to poor service experiences [6][10].

messages.content: You are a professional local business analyst. Please objectively and accurately answer user questions about a specific business based on the provided context. Be honest if you don't know.

Business Name: Alameda Main Street
Category: Ferry terminal

Real Customer Reviews (Total: 10):
[1] Beautiful bridge and city views. Well maintained ferries. Coffee truck in the morning. Civilized, relaxing, traffic free commute. Only drawback is the packed and muddy parking lots.
[2] I love being near the water,  security is awesome and friendly,  public restrooms.
[3] There is no better way to commute to the city than on the ferry.  And what a great way to go to the city in the weekends with your kids.  Like Fastrak, I always suggest buying tickets in bulk to save some money and time even if you're a "sometimes" user.  When it's busy I just want to be able to sit in a seat and not worry about getting my ticket.
[4] Amazing resource for the island. Parking as hell don't drive if you can help it. Ride a bike. Always fills up in the morning by 8 a.m. and you're walking 10 minutes from the overflow lots in the dirt.
[5] Take the ferry to San Francisco! Fun, quick and no traffic!
[6] No way to charge your clipper card. A lot of parking space and its free.
[7] For anyone wondering the best way to travel from Alameda to San Francisco, this is your best bet. $6.80 one way is more than affordable for a trip into the big city. Even on the weekends the ferries are regular and don't leave you without a seat. Our AirBnB host recommends getting there early if you plan to travel early on weekdays.
[8] The Ferry is the best way to travel to and from San Francisco from Alameda. During working hours the ferry passes frequently below the hour and is a bit crowded. During the most relaxed hours, the frequency with which it passes is once an hour. Times change according to whether you are in the working week or on the weekend. It takes more or less half an hour to reach SF on the outward journey and a few minutes less on the return journey.
[9] I wish the Ferry would run more regularly and later at night to make it a viable transportation option.  At this point it basically is limited to commuters and a few tourists.  Give us a regular schedule and more boats.  Provide a bus service to the terminal  Make it a transportation system of the future.
[10] Was so nice and convenient to use to see the Giants play

I'm sorry, but the provided customer reviews do not contain information regarding this.
